steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: A holotype is the original specimen; a neotype is “not the exact specimen originally described.” This distinction signals a contrast.

steps.title: Apply the transition
steps.content: ”By contrast,” signals the turn to a different reference organism type. Moreover, admittedly, and for instance each suggest continuity, concession, or exemplification rather than a shift in type. That matches choice A — A is correct.
